def solve(s : String) : Array(String)
    seen = Set.new(String)
    segments = Array.new(String)
    i = 0
    while i < s.size
        current = ''
        j = i
        while j < s.size
            current += s[j]
            if not seen.include?(current)
                break
            j += 1
        if j == s.size
            break
        seen.add(current)
        segments.append(current)
        i = j + 1
    end
    return segments
end
```
